news.title: İran'ın dondurulmuş varlıkları: Para nerede ve neden önemli?
news.summary: Bazı tahminlere göre değeri 100 milyar dolara kadar ulaşan bu fonlara erişim, Tahran'ın temel taleplerinden biri oldu. Fakat söz konusu fonlar, yaptırımlar ve bankacılık kısıtlamaları nedeniyle hâlâ erişilemez durumda.

news.title: Murat Ongun: 'Milyarlarca liralık yolsuzluk iddiasına tek bir kanıt yok'
news.summary: İstanbul Büyükşehir Belediyesi (İBB) hakkında yolsuzluk iddialarıyla açılan 400 kişiden fazla sanığın yargılandığı dava sanık savunmalarıyla devam ediyor.

news.title: Fransa, İsveç'i rahat geçerek son 16'ya kaldı
news.summary: 2026 Dünya Kupası'nın favorilerinden Fransa, son 32 turundaki rakibi İsveç'i 3-0 yenerek, adını bir sonraki tura yazdırdı. Fransa'nın son 16'daki rakibi Paraguay oldu.

news.title: Otoyol ve köprü ücretlerinde fiyat artışı. İşte yeni geçiş ücretleri
news.summary: Otoyol ve köprü geçiş ücretlerinde fiyat artışı yapıldı. Osmangazi ile Çanakkale Köprüsü'nde geçiş ücreti bin 170 lira oldu. Yavuz Sultan Selim Köprüsü'nde ise 110 lira oldu.

news.title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
news.summary: The president's crypto income far outpaces his earnings from real estate and Trump-themed items such as watches.

news.title: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
news.summary: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.

news.title: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
news.summary: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.

news.title: US Supreme Court has dealt heavy defeats to Trump, while expanding his power
news.summary: The birthright ruling brings to an end a Supreme Court term that has delivered the president some key victories.

news.title: A plane crashed into a tower in Beijing but China is not saying what happened
news.summary: The collision left holes on the side of the tower, but Beijing has scrubbed other visible traces of the incident.

news.title: Roof collapse kills 14 children at Pakistan tuition centre
news.summary: Two people are taken into custody after the incident in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.

news.title: USA face Bosnia in World Cup knockouts, with pride, credentials on the line
news.summary: Winning the whole tournament might be a stretch, but USA must look to regain momentum against Bosnia and Herzegovina.

news.title: Mercury’s Thomas says received online abuse following WNBA suspension
news.summary: Mercury forward Alyssa Thomas was suspended for a game after making contact with her fist on Caitlin Clark's throat.

news.title: UN chief fears for ‘millions’ of Palestinians amid UNRWA funding shortfall
news.summary: Antonio Guterres denounces 'disinformation, smear campaigns' against the UN agency for Palestinian refugees.

news.title: Iran says it couldn’t export a ‘single barrel of oil’ during US blockade
news.summary: Iran was unable to export any oil during the US blockade of its ports, the country's chief negotiator has said.

news.title: US lifts restrictions on Anthropic’s powerful AI models Fable and Mythos
news.summary: AI firm says it will begin restoring access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after removal of export controls.

news.title: Southeast Asia’s homegrown artists are knocking K-pop off its pedestal
news.summary: Drawing lessons from the global success of K-Pop, the region is finding its own voice in a new generation of artists.

news.title: What the Supreme Court did on the final day of its term
news.summary: The Supreme Court upheld the right of children born on U.S. soil to automatic American citizenship. In so doing, the court rejected President Trump's most aggressive attempt to limit immigration.

news.title: NPR discusses error in reporting on the last day of the Supreme Court term
news.summary: All Things Considered host Scott Detrow speaks with NPR's editor-in-chief Thomas Evans and Nina Totenberg about her reporting on the final day of the Supreme Court term.

news.title: Meta considered buying Kalshi before developing its own prediction market app
news.summary: Mark Zuckerberg met with Kalshi's CEO last year about a potential deal, but talks did not move forward. Now Meta is making its own prediction market app.

news.title: FDA scientists flag concerns with peptides, the trendy molecules RFK Jr. supports
news.summary: Documents reviewing the research on peptides note lack of good evidence of efficacy or safety. Yet an FDA panel will consider easing access to them later this month.

news.title: It's going to be a hot July Fourth for much of the country
news.summary: The National Weather Service has issued heat warnings and watches for much of the Midwest and East heading into the holiday weekend. In many places, the temperatures could shatter records.

news.title: Rep. Tom Kean returns to Congress, says depression is why he went missing for months
news.summary: The New Jersey Republican was missing for months with no explanation for his constituents. He explained in a House floor speech that after his diagnosis, there was no timeline for recovery.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
